title: Satellite & Sit-and-Go Analysis: Tela Dedicada para Satélites e Spin & Gold
plan: Add satellite-specific repository queries in src/db/repository.py (get_satellites, get_satellite_hands, get_satellites_by_category)

Extend SpinAnalyzer in src/analyzers/spin.py to compute full satellite stats: breakdown by category (Spin & Gold, Steps, Regular Sats, MEGA), win rates, ROI, profit per category, comparative play stats (VPIP/PFR/3Bet/AF) for spin vs regular tournaments
Add satellite/spin analysis step to src/analytics_pipeline.py to persist satellite stats to analytics.db
Create prepare_satellites_data() function in src/web/data.py to load and format satellite analytics for the template
Add 'satellites' to VALID_TABS and route handler in src/web/routes/tournament.py
Create src/web/templates/tournament/satellites.html with overview cards, category breakdown tables, play stats comparison, and timeline/history
Update src/web/templates/base.html to add Satellites & S&G tab in tournament navigation
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
